meaning: n.十全十美主义者,[哲]至善论者
examples: He was such a perfectionist that he published only those results that satisfied him completely.
She's a perfectionist to her fingertips.
Virginia was a perfectionist. She was just not prepared to settle for anything mediocre.
Then he was an aggressive perfectionist whose single-minded self-belief contributed to his Anfield downfall.
The 33-year-veteran of the company had proved to be a perfectionist with raging ambition.
